content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Unstable String Sort". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/1213/problem/F
constraints: S contains only lowercase English letters
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then T test cases follow. The first line of each test case contains an integer N, the length of the string. The second line contains a string S of length N.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print the unstable sorted string.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use a custom sorting comparator to sort the string in an unstable manner.
